name: @omadia/verifier
description: Answer-Verifier tool-set for the byte5 Harness. Bundles VerifierService + VerifierPipeline + ClaimExtractor + DeterministicChecker + EvidenceJudge + GraphEvidenceFetcher + VerifierStore + TriggerRouter + FailureReplayDetector + CorrectionPrompt plus the GraphLookupTool factory used by accounting/hr sub-agents. Consumes the kernel capability knowledgeGraph (and graphPool for VerifierStore writes) via ctx.services.get instead of direct construction.
